chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4434 of 2023 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.20452/2023 2.For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Syed Ali Ahmed Zaidi, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, A.A.G. Per learned counsel directions were given vide order dated 15.11.2023 for the respondents to consider the case of the petitioner for regularization. He states that the same has not been done. Learned A.A.G. states that the application dated 25.11.2023 provided to the Assistant Director, Population Welfare Department shall be decided expeditiously, preferable within a period of 15 days, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending aforesaid no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. In view hereof, the learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge NASIR
